event_detail: OpenSea began displaying selected NFTs on its homepage
market_health_signal: Venue-controlled attention event that could affect NFT demand

event_detail: Chastain was responsible for selecting homepage-featured NFTs and knew the selections before public display
market_health_signal: Non-public marketplace information available to an employee

event_detail: Chastain bought dozens of NFTs shortly before they or related creator works were featured
market_health_signal: Pre-event accumulation before confidential venue event became public

event_detail: Chastain sold after OpenSea feature placement at two to five times initial purchase price
Trades were conducted through anonymous digital-currency wallets and anonymous OpenSea accounts
market_health_signal: Identity separation between marketplace role and trading activity

event_detail: Chastain was convicted at trial and sentenced to prison, home confinement, supervised release, fine, and ETH forfeiture
market_health_signal: Legal confirmation that marketplace-insider NFT trading can be prosecuted as fraud
source: DOJ conviction statement and sentencing release
